name: KnowBe4
description: Monitor KnowBe4 security awareness training campaigns and phishing simulation results for compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to KnowBe4 KSAT at https://training.knowbe4.com
2. Go to Account Settings → API
3. Click 'Generate New API Key' (Reporting API)
4. Copy the key
5. Determine your region from your KnowBe4 URL:
   - US: us
   - EU: eu
   - Canada: ca
   - UK: uk
   - Germany: de
6. Enter both values below

Note: The Reporting API requires a Platinum or Diamond subscription. The User Event API key will NOT work.

credentialFields.label: Reporting API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in KnowBe4 KSAT console → Account Settings → API → Generate New API Key. Requires Platinum or Diamond subscription.

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your KnowBe4 region prefix: 'us' for United States, 'eu' for Europe, 'ca' for Canada, 'uk' for United Kingdom, 'de' for Germany. Found in your KnowBe4 login URL.

checks.name: KnowBe4 App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the KnowBe4 Reporting API is accessible.

checks.name: KnowBe4 Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to KnowBe4 by checking account info and user count.
